0.title: Relates to the appropriation to the Department of Health and Welfare for fiscal year 2027.

1.last_action: Returned from House Failed; to Secretary of Senate
1.title: Amends existing law to require drivers to drive in the right-hand lane on multilane highways unless passing and to provide penalties for driving in the left-hand lane of a controlled access highway and impeding the flow of traffic.

2.last_action: Read First Time, Referred to Business
2.title: Adds to existing law to establish the Virtual Currency Kiosk Fraud Prevention Act.

3.last_action: Reported Printed; referred to State Affairs
3.title: Adds to existing law to establish the Virtual Currency Kiosk Fraud Prevention Act.

4.last_action: Reported Printed and Referred to Ways & Means
4.title: States findings of the Legislature and encourages the celebration of America250 in Idaho.

5.last_action: Delivered to Secretary of State at 11:46 a.m. on January 26, 2026
5.title: States findings of the Legislature and encourages the celebration of America250 in Idaho.

6.last_action: Filed in Office of Secretary of Senate
6.title: States findings of the Senate and endorses the development of a state plan to support kinship caregivers.

7.last_action: Read second time; filed for Third Reading
7.title: Adds to existing law to establish provisions regarding inappropriate online behavior by students and to prescribe a process for student discipline by the school district or public charter school.

8.last_action: Reported enrolled; signed by President; to House for signature of Speaker
8.title: Amends existing law to revise provisions regarding reporting requirements and to establish provisions regarding noncompliance.

9.last_action: Reported Printed and Referred to Revenue & Taxation
9.title: Amends existing law to provide certain procedures for the credit and refund of certain sales taxes paid erroneously.

10.last_action: Read First Time, Referred to State Affairs
10.title: States findings of the Legislature and urges the United States House of Representatives and Senate to take immediate federal action to restore clarity, consistency, and stability to intercollegiate athletics.

11.last_action: Reported Signed by Governor on March 19, 2026 Session Law Chapter 59 Effective: 07/01/2026
11.title: Amends existing law to allow prospective jurors in certain circumstances to volunteer as poll workers in lieu of serving on a jury.

12.last_action: Read First Time, Referred to Business
12.title: Adds to existing law to establish the Idaho E-Verify Act.

13.last_action: Reported Printed and Referred to Education
13.title: Amends existing law to revise provisions regarding public charter school admissions.

14.last_action: Delivered to Governor at 2 p.m. on March 19, 2026
14.title: Amends existing law to revise provisions regarding public charter school admission procedures.

15.last_action: Reported Printed; referred to Judiciary & Rules
15.title: Amends existing law to provide that certain judges shall not be eligible to serve as a senior judge and may not elect to receive certain retirement compensation.

16.last_action: Introduced, read first time; referred to: State Affairs
16.title: Adds to existing law to establish certain requirements for employers to verify the lawful status of workers.

17.last_action: Reported Printed and Referred to Business
17.title: Adds to existing law to establish certain requirements for employers to verify the lawful status of workers.

18.last_action: Reported Printed and Referred to Education
18.title: Amends existing law to revise provisions regarding virtual public education in Idaho.

19.last_action: Reported Signed by Governor on March 10, 2026 Session Law Chapter 12 Effective: 07/01/2026
19.title: Amends existing law to revise provisions regarding virtual public education in Idaho.

20.last_action: Filed in Office of the Secretary of Senate
20.title: Relates to the maintenance appropriations to the Department of Health and Welfare and the State Independent Living Council for fiscal year 2027.

21.last_action: Reported Printed and Referred to Education
21.title: Amends existing law to provide that instructional hours in school districts' and public charter schools' academic year shall not begin prior to the Tuesday following Labor Day.

22.last_action: Reported Printed and Referred to Revenue & Taxation
22.title: Amends and adds to existing law to establish certain permitting requirements regarding the sale of certain nicotine products, to revise provisions regarding the regulation of certain nicotine products, and to impose a tax on certain nicotine and related products.

23.title: Relates to reducing the appropriation for fiscal year 2026.

24.last_action: Reported out of Committee with Do Pass Recommendation; Filed for second reading
24.title: Amends existing law to make codifier's corrections.

25.title: Amends, repeals, and adds to existing law to establish the Uniform Guardianship, Conservatorship, and Other Protective Arrangements Act.
